title: Comments
description: Write comments that document your code
template:
# My first quest will be to:

print('Are you ready to begin our journey?')
solution:
# My first quest will be to:
# Conquer the world!
print('Are you ready to begin our journey?')

title: Numbers
template:
health = 100
damage = 25.5
print('Health:', health)
print('Damage:', damage)
solution:
health = 100
damage = 25.5
print('Health:', health)
print('Damage:', damage)
print(health - damage)

title: Strings
solution:
# Create the two variables below:
character_class = "Warrior"
quest_name = 'The Ancient Temple'

title: Empty Variables
template:
# Set the name of the character to None
name = 'Xaden'
solution: name = None # The character's name has not been entered yet

title: Variables Recap
template:
# Initialize your character's attributes here

# Don't change the lines below
print(f'Level = {level}')
print(f'Strength = {strength}')
print(f'role = {role}')
solution:
# Initialize your character's attributes here
level = 5
strength = 42.1
role = 'Warrior'

# Don't change the lines below
print(f'Level = {level}')
print(f'Strength = {strength}')
print(f'role = {role}')

title: Changing Numbers
description: Change the value of a variable
solution:
# First we create the variables
quilt_width = 8
quilt_length = 12

# Then we print the size
print(quilt_width * quilt_length)

# Whoops! That's a little too large
quilt_length = 8

# Let's see how large it is now
print(quilt_width * quilt_length)
